detail: spec gate: cold spec-judge rejected across two rounds before pass — oracle flagged an orphaned agent-filed-marker claim and a missing log-surfaced still-open->draft companion; builder flagged the cut disposition had no named durable home (implementer-guessable) and one decorative validation-order scenario. Fixed by adding the disposition:open|resolved field to the strategy shape (combat-log-governance), pairing the log side, giving the marker a scenario, and dropping the decorative scenario.

spec gate: architect rejected the resolved-disposition pending-count scenario as a co-owned seam property staged inside scanner.feature (a different unit's behavior), and flagged that the gateway — which owns the count — neither documented nor tested the disposition exclusion. Fixed by rewording scanner's scenario to a write-time entry property (matching the frozen leash-block precedent) and adding the consumer-side scenario + doc sweep to gateway/.
